content.scenarioHint: 你最近有什么兴趣爱好？对方提到他刚完成一次徒步旅行，你想通过共同经历开启更深入的对话。
expectedAnswers: No way! I hiked that trail last month too—was the view really that amazing?
Really? I just did the same hike last month! How was the trail compared to what you expected?
Small world! I walked that path last month—did you also stop at the overlook for photos?
I can't believe it! I hiked that route just a few weeks ago—was the weather as perfect as it looks in your pics?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了惊讶并建立了共同经历的联系
语言准确性：语法结构正确，时态使用恰当
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常对话的语气和节奏
关键词覆盖：使用了'hiked', 'trail', 'view'或相关场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你正在与一位新认识的人聊天，想通过了解对方的业余爱好来建立联系并开启更深入的对话，比如询问对方下班后或空闲时间喜欢做什么。
expectedAnswers: What do you usually do to relax after work?
Do you have any hobbies you enjoy in your free time?
How do you usually spend your weekends?
Is there something you like doing to unwind when you're not working?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否成功引导对方分享个人兴趣或放松方式
语言准确性：语法结构正确，用词恰当，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合日常英语口语习惯，不生硬或书面化
关键词覆盖：使用了与'放松'、'爱好'、'空闲时间'相关的关键词

content.speakerText: What’s something you’ve been getting into lately?
expectedAnswers: I’ve been learning to knit—I made a scarf for my sister last week!
I started journaling every morning. It’s helped me feel more grounded.
I’ve been trying out yoga. I even joined a class on Saturdays now.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达新近培养的兴趣
语言准确性：是否正确使用‘get into’或‘start/try out’等表达新兴趣的结构
表达自然度：是否包含时间细节（last week, every morning, now）增强真实感
关键词覆盖：是否使用兴趣类动词（learning, journaling, trying out）
